untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'observable deterioration trend in primary fundamental metric' which cannot be expressed using only technical price/volume indicators. Fundamental metrics are not in the allowed indicator list. Also, precise 12-month percentile range calculation is not directly available—price_pos_20 is a 20-period position proxy only.
translation_notes: Translated 'asset declined for at least 1 measurement period' as returns < 0. Translated 'bottom 20th percentile of 12-month range' as price_pos_20 < 0.2 (20-period proxy). Translated 'exit at top 35th percentile of entry range' as price_pos_20 > 0.35. The fundamental deterioration condition and precise 12-month percentile thresholds cannot be operationalized with available indicators.
